message:
Add jfp i (interactive mode) command

- fzf-style prompt picker using @inquirer/prompts search
- Real-time BM25 search integration
- Action menu: copy, view, install (personal/project), export-md
- Clipboard support via pbcopy/xclip/xsel
- Loops until explicit exit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
